commands: set -euxo pipefail; mkdir -p /tmp/qdb /tmp/tmp_aa /tmp/tmp_ss; echo '=== AA DB ==='; foldseek base:createdb /mnt/disks/bucket/oneoff/full_test_007/aa.fasta /tmp/qdb/query -v 3; ls -la /tmp/qdb/; echo '=== 3Di DB (to sidecar) ==='; foldseek base:createdb /mnt/disks/bucket/oneoff/full_test_007/prostt5_3di_clean.fasta /tmp/tmp_ss/ss -v 3; ls -la /tmp/tmp_ss/; echo '=== RENAME ss DB files to query_ss/query_ss.index/query_ss.dbtype ==='; cp /tmp/tmp_ss/ss /tmp/qdb/query_ss; cp /tmp/tmp_ss/ss.index /tmp/qdb/query_ss.index; cp /tmp/tmp_ss/ss.dbtype /tmp/qdb/query_ss.dbtype; echo '=== Patch query_ss.dbtype to 3Di type (0x0D = 13) ==='; echo '=== Target pdb_ss.dbtype bytes ==='; od -An -tx1 /mnt/disks/bucket/databases/foldseek/pdb/pdb_ss.dbtype; echo '=== query.dbtype bytes ==='; od -An -tx1 /tmp/qdb/query.dbtype; echo '=== Copy target dbtype to query_ss.dbtype ==='; cp /mnt/disks/bucket/databases/foldseek/pdb/pdb_ss.dbtype /tmp/qdb/query_ss.dbtype; od -An -tx1 /tmp/qdb/query_ss.dbtype; ls -la /tmp/qdb/; echo '=== SEARCH ==='; foldseek search /tmp/qdb/query /mnt/disks/bucket/databases/foldseek/pdb/pdb /tmp/aln /tmp/tmpwork --threads 4 -e 100 -s 9.5 -v 3 2>&1 | tail -40; echo '=== CONVERTALIS ==='; foldseek convertalis /tmp/qdb/query /mnt/disks/bucket/databases/foldseek/pdb/pdb /tmp/aln /tmp/results.tsv --format-output 'query,target,fident,alnlen,mismatch,gapopen,qstart,qend,tstart,tend,evalue,bits,taxid,taxname,theader' 2>&1 | tail -20; echo '=== RESULTS ==='; wc -l /tmp/results.tsv; head -20 /tmp/results.tsv; cp /tmp/results.tsv /mnt/disks/bucket/oneoff/full_test_007/foldseek_results.tsv; echo DONE
